title: Craftable Modloaders
description: Adds more modloader support, but the modloaders are items!
body:
# About this mod:
This mod adds craftable modloaders to the game ~~and some secrets~~

## Included modloader items
- Forge
- NeoForge
- Fabric
- Quilt

If you want to know the secrets:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

there is a "what does the fox say" music disc

</details>
